amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya Marble Platter with Gold Leaf Inlay - Premium Serving Tray for Snacks & Desserts, Kitchen & Dining Serveware
bullet_points: Elegant Marble Design: Crafted from premium white marble with intricate gold leaf inlay for a luxurious serving experience.
Multi-purpose Use: Perfect for serving appetizers, sweets, dry fruits, or as a decorative centerpiece in your dining area.
Durable & Easy to Clean: Sturdy marble surface ensures longevity and effortless cleaning after use.
Ideal Gift Choice: Great for gifting on Indian festivals, weddings, and special occasions to loved ones.
Compact & Stylish: Unique shape and gold leaf detailing elevate your table setting and enhance home decor.
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Upgrade your dining experience with the Tatsya Marble Platter featuring exquisite gold leaf inlay. Perfect for serving snacks, sweets, and appetizers, this elegant kitchenware piece brings a blend of tradition and modernity to your home. Durable and easy to maintain, it also makes a thoughtful gift for Indian festivities and special moments.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Craftsmanship Story: Highlighting the marble selection and gold leaf inlay process with close-up visuals.
Usage Occasion Gallery: Showcasing platter in Indian festival settings like Diwali and wedding spreads.
Material & Care Guide: Explain marble durability and cleaning tips with illustrative icons.
Gift Packaging & Presentation: Displaying premium packaging suitable for gifting.
Lifestyle Imagery: Featuring elegant dining table settings with Indian snacks and sweets displayed beautifully.

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Maintain original marble color, gold leaf inlay design, unique shaped edges exactly as shown; no alterations or additions.
recommended_image_angles: Top-down view to display gold leaf inlay fully
45-degree angle side view showing platter shape
Close-up macro of marble texture and gold details
Lifestyle wide angle with served snacks or sweets
Inset image showing product in premium packaging
recommended_real_life_environments: Modern Indian dining table with minimalistic decor
Traditional Indian festival setup (Diwali or wedding)
Well-lit kitchen or serving counter setting
Elegant home living/dining room with warm tones

Wedding mehendi or engagement ceremony snacks display
Family gathering or dinner party plating
Diwali or Raksha Bandhan gift exchange table
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Soft, warm professional lighting that enhances marble texture and gold shine realistically; avoid harsh shadows or glare.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean, bright, premium with white or subtle pastel backgrounds and elegant fonts; clear image focus on product details and use case visuals.

image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Top or bottom blank spaces in lifestyle images with enough contrast; avoid overlay on gold leaf inlay or marble texture spots.
what_must_be_avoided: Cluttered scenes with too many props
Bright artificial colors that distort marble or gold
Generic flat lays without cultural context
